title: paspalum floridanum
intro: Paspalum floridanum, also known as Florida paspalum or Bahia grass, is a perennial grass species native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paspalum floridanum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of Paspalum floridanum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
